---
title: "Lecture 3: The 4B Framework"
date: "2026-05-21"
order: 3
description: "Slide-deck companion to Lesson 3 — the four tenets of Bobology and the scaffolding that holds them, distilled into 20-some slides for live delivery."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobbology, framework]
path: /assets/the-4b-framework.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/the-4b-framework.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/the-4b-framework.html">long-form lecture</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/the-4b-framework.pdf");</script>
```
